seo.title: Setu Retail — Retail Management Software for India & Global Businesses | Coming Soon
seo.description: Setu Retail is retail store management software for inventory, billing and store operations — built for businesses in India and globally. Get notified when it launches.

hero.headline: Retail Management Software for India & Global Businesses
hero.subheadline: Inventory tracking, billing and store operations built for retail businesses in India and worldwide — part of the same platform powering Setu Dine.

body.headline: What we're building
paragraphs: Setu Retail brings the same operator-first approach behind Setu Dine to retail stores — inventory that stays accurate, billing that's fast at the counter, and visibility across every store location.
We're building it on the same multi-outlet architecture already running in Setu Dine, so retail chains get multi-store reporting from day one.

cta.headline: Want early access to Setu Retail?
cta.subtext: Tell us about your retail business and we'll notify you as soon as Setu Retail launches.

crossSell.text: Already running a restaurant? Setu Dine is live today.
